text:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=267062 --> https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=786b3ebb6793a6254904cee75621240dfceb6060 is probably what you're looking for?

This is fixed in both latest quarterly and main branch so you probably need to refresh your tree?
